lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.
The car is in mint condition. It shows no signs of wear on the exterior or interior and is in like-new condition. It is mechanically flawless.
This vehicle is in mint condition. The interior and exterior show no signs of wear or damage. All mechanical and electrical systems are fully functional and perform as new.

Looking for a reliable and stylish ride? This car is in good condition and has been well-cared for, offering a smooth drive and a clean interior. It shows some minor, expected wear from regular use, but it remains a solid, dependable vehicle that is ready for your next adventure!

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive work to become a reliable daily driver. The engine runs roughly and struggles under load, while the transmission has significant hesitation when shifting. There are visible rust spots on the body panels, and the interior shows heavy wear and tear, including some tears in the upholstery. It is being sold as-is, likely best as a project car or for parts.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant work to become roadworthy again. The exterior has multiple large dents, peeling clear coat, and visible rust on several panels. Mechanically, the engine runs but has a noticeable knock and the transmission slips between gears. The interior shows heavy wear, including torn upholstery and a cracked dashboard. This is being sold as-is, strictly as a project car or for parts.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally maintained vehicle, currently offered in commendable condition. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure both mechanical reliability and aesthetic standards. Featuring a refined interior and a robust powertrain, this vehicle represents a superior balance of performance and long-term value. It serves as an ideal selection for the discerning driver seeking a dependable, high-caliber automotive investment.

Hey there! Are you ready for your next adventure? I'm parting with my trusty car, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive! It’s in really solid shape and has plenty of life left in it. It's perfect if you're looking for something reliable and well-cared-for that still looks great on the road. I've priced it to sell, so let’s get you behind the wheel today!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and a high-revving 7,900 RPM redline. Mechanically robust, the VANOS unit has been serviced and the rear subframe reinforced—critical preventative measures for this chassis. It features a crisp 6-speed manual transmission paired with a factory limited-slip differential for optimal power delivery. Clean title. Runs well. Regular maintenance. Minor cosmetic wear. No mechanical issues.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of reliability and performance, maintained with a high level of care. The exterior finish retains a beautiful luster, though you may find the occasional minor stone chip or light surface scratch typical of careful road use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and has been kept in a smoke-free environment; the leather seating shows only light softening and remains supportive and comfortable. All interior electronics, from the dual-zone climate control to the infotainment system, are fully operational. Mechanically, the car is in great shape, featuring a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that has been serviced at regular intervals. The brakes feel firm, and the tires possess significant tread life. It comes with a complete set of service records and a clean title, making it a dependable choice for anyone seeking a premium driving experience without the new-car price tag.

Presenting a distinguished vehicle that exemplifies consistent maintenance and reliable performance. We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, this unit demonstrates consistent performance and remains in commendable condition. It offers a sophisticated driving experience and represents an exceptional value proposition for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of luxury and reliability.

It runs like a dream and has been well-loved. Come take it for a spin, you're going to love how it handles!

Available is a well-sorted 2004 BMW M3 (E46) featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS timing. This example is equipped with the Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory variable M differential lock for optimal power delivery. The chassis remains taut with a recently refreshed multi-link rear suspension and reinforced subframe mounting points. Performance is sharp thanks to the high-revving 8,000 RPM redline and responsive hydraulic rack-and-pinion steering. Mechanically sound with documented valve adjustments and a clean cooling system, this M3 offers an authentic, visceral driving experience for the discerning purist.
Used car. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean interior. Runs well.

Presenting a meticulously cared-for vehicle that exemplifies pride of ownership. The exterior boasts a vibrant finish, showing only the lightest incidental marks typical of a respected daily driver. Step inside to a smoke-free interior where the upholstery remains taut and the carpets are pristine. Every feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system, operates flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs quiet and strong, backed by a comprehensive service history that proves its mechanical integrity. With recent fluid flushes and a fresh set of high-performance tires, this car offers a tight, quiet, and dependable driving experience for the discerning buyer.
